text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 
8 
IMMUNIZATIONS_IND 
LABEL: 
Immunization Services Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is an indicator as to whether or not the pharmacy offers some level immunizations on-
site. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: IMMUNIZATIONS_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCDPD DataQ™ 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes, pharmacy offers immunizations 
N = No, pharmacy does not offer immunizations 
Null/missing= This
